title: El Mundo Entero
overview: An enthusiast pioneer founds a city full of alchemical  symbolism. A gentleman is named Grand Master of the Lodge  of the Eastern Knights. A writer publishes the frst utopian  novel of Uruguay. An entrepreneur builds castles, churches, hotels and palaces that will have different destinies. The  pioneer, the Knight, the writer and the businessman are the same man: Francisco Piria.
